patch.description: Patch is the raw JSON strategic merge patch to apply to the deployment. The patch is applied as-is using the Kubernetes strategic merge patch strategy. Example: {"spec": {"replicas": 3}} to scale, or          {"spec": {"template": {"spec": {"containers": [{"name": "app", "image": "app:v2"}]}}}} to update an image.

PatchDeploymentParams.title: Patch Deployment Params
PatchDeploymentParams.description: PatchDeploymentParams contains parameters for the patch_deployment action. Applies a strategic merge patch to a deployment.
